title: Pelagic soft-surface slice complete: Cycle 4 queue drift repaired
body: claim 8e48a99b-7f53-4b28-a504-de3d8aae73cb complete. Also corrected the lesson in napkin: re-check git log + active queue before preserving causal explanation from comms. No archive/stage/commit.
